vocab.meaning: những tòa nhà chọc trời cao ngất ngưởng
vocab.example: My neighborhood is dominated by towering skyscrapers that seem to touch the clouds.
A series of high-rise apartment complexes sprawl across the horizon just a few blocks from my house.
The urban landscape near my residence has changed dramatically with the addition of several glass-fronted towers.

vocab.meaning: làm cản trở/che khuất tầm nhìn
vocab.example: I used to see the mountains, but recently, a massive office block was built that completely obstructs the view.

vocab.meaning: khu rừng bê tông (nơi có quá nhiều tòa nhà cao tầng)
vocab.example: Living in the heart of the city, I'm surrounded by a concrete jungle with very little green space between the buildings.

vocab.meaning: khu nhà ở có mật độ dân cư cao
vocab.example: The area has seen a surge in high-density housing to accommodate the growing population of young professionals.

vocab.meaning: sự mở rộng theo chiều dọc (xây dựng lên cao)
vocab.example: Due to the scarcity of land, the city council has encouraged vertical expansion in my district.

vocab.meaning: làm cho các khu vực xung quanh trở nên nhỏ bé
vocab.example: There is a new 50-story commercial center that absolutely dwarfs the older, two-story houses nearby.

vocab.meaning: kiến trúc hiện đại bậc nhất
vocab.example: The tall buildings near my home are examples of state-of-the-art architecture, featuring eco-friendly glass and solar panels.
I live within close proximity to a financial hub where most of the city's tallest structures are located.
